name: Potatoes Romanoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes until tender.
2. Mash them with butter, sour cream, onions, three-quarters of a cup of cheese, salt, and pepper.
3. Transfer the mixture into a buttered 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle remaining cheese and paprika on top.
5. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
